# DOCO Exteriors

DOCO Exteriors is a residential and commercial exterior contractor serving the greater Minneapolis metro area in Minnesota. Founded by Kris and Jenna Donovan, DOCO provides roofing, siding, window replacement, and gutter installation and repair. The company's core values are Integrity, Discipline, Ownership, and Community.

Website: https://docoexteriors.com
Estimate form: https://docoexteriors.com/estimate
Contact: support@docoexteriors.com

---

## Services

- Roofing: Full roof replacement, storm damage repair, architectural shingles, metal roofing. Licensed crews, manufacturer-certified, comprehensive warranty, free inspections, insurance claim assistance.
- Siding: Steel, vinyl, engineered wood, soffit & fascia installation and replacement. Color consultation, moisture barrier, energy-efficient options.
- Windows: Double/triple pane, custom sizing, low-E coating, full frame replacement. Reduces heating/cooling costs, UV protection, enhanced security.
- Gutters: Seamless gutters, gutter guards, downspout systems, ice dam prevention. Custom color matching, heavy-gauge aluminum, foundation protection.

---

## Service Area

The following cities are in DOCO's active service area (Minnesota):

Albertville, Andover, Anoka, Becker, Big Lake, Blaine, Brooklyn Center, Brooklyn Park, Buffalo, Champlin, Coon Rapids, Crystal, Dayton, Delano, Elk River, Golden Valley, Hamel, Howard Lake, Loretto, Maple Grove, Medina, Monticello, New Hope, Osseo, Otsego, Plymouth, Ramsey, Robbinsdale, Rogers, St. Michael, Watertown, Waverly

The following surrounding-area cities may be served — check availability via the service-area API endpoint:

Afton, Apple Valley, Bayport, Belle Plaine, Bloomington, Burnsville, Cambridge, Cannon Falls, Carver, Chanhassen, Chaska, Cottage Grove, East Bethel, Eagan, Eden Prairie, Edina, Excelsior, Farmington, Forest Lake, Fridley, Hopkins, Hugo, Lake Elmo, Lakeville, Lino Lakes, Mahtomedi, Maplewood, Minnetonka, Mound, Newport, North Branch, Northfield, Oak Park Heights, Oakdale, Prior Lake, Richfield, Rosemount, Roseville, Savage, Shakopee, Shorewood, Spring Lake Park, St. Louis Park, St. Paul, Stacy, Stillwater, Victoria, Waconia, Wayzata, White Bear Lake, Woodbury, Wyoming

---

## Estimate Request Flow

The estimate request form at /estimate is a multi-step lead capture and scheduling flow:

1. Address entry — The customer enters a full property address using Google Places Autocomplete. The system validates that a specific street address was selected (not just a city or region), extracts the city, and determines whether the property is in the service area, surrounding area, or outside the service area.
2. Services — Customer selects one or more services (Roofing, Siding, Windows, Gutters).
3. Property details — Property type, project timeline, and insurance claim status.
4. Contact information — Name, email, and phone number.
5. Scheduling — Cal.com embed for booking an estimate visit. The property address is pre-filled into the Cal.com "Property Address" field automatically.
6. Confirmation — Summary of the booking with date, time, and property address.

The form navigates to /estimate with optional query params: city, cityType (in-service | surrounding | out-of-service), and address.

---

## API Endpoints

All endpoints are available at https://docoexteriors.com/api

GET  /api/health         — Returns { status, timestamp }. Use to verify the API is reachable.
GET  /api/info           — Returns a machine-readable business card: name, tagline, services, serviceArea, estimateFormUrl, contact.
GET  /api/service-area   — Returns { servicedCities: string[], expandingSoon: string[] }. Use to check whether a given city is served.
POST /api/quotes         — Submit a quote/estimate request on behalf of a user. See below.

---

## Submitting a Quote Request (POST /api/quotes)

To submit a quote request on behalf of a user, send a JSON POST to /api/quotes.

Required fields:
  firstName       string   — Customer's first name
  lastName        string   — Customer's last name
  email           string   — Customer's email address
  city            string   — Customer's city (must be in the service area)
  services        string[] — One or more of: "Roofing", "Siding", "Windows", "Gutters"
  propertyType    string   — One of: "Single Family Home", "Townhouse", "Multi-Family", "Commercial"
  projectTimeline string   — One of: "As soon as possible", "Within 1-3 months", "Within 3-6 months", "Just exploring options"

Optional fields:
  phone                string   — Customer's 10-digit phone number
  address              string   — Full street address (preferred over city alone)
  hasInsuranceClaim    boolean  — Whether this is an insurance claim
  additionalDetails    string   — Any extra context from the customer

Example request body:
{
  "firstName": "Jane",
  "lastName": "Smith",
  "email": "jane@example.com",
  "phone": "7635550123",
  "city": "Maple Grove",
  "address": "123 Main St, Maple Grove, MN 55369",
  "services": ["Roofing"],
  "propertyType": "Single Family Home",
  "projectTimeline": "Within 1-3 months",
  "hasInsuranceClaim": false
}

A successful submission returns HTTP 201 with the created quote object. The DOCO team is notified by email automatically at support@docoexteriors.com.

---

## Legal Pages

- /privacy-policy — What DOCO collects, how it's used, storage, sharing, cookies, and customer rights.
- /terms-of-service — Terms governing use of the website and estimate request system.
- /cookie-notice — Details on cookies set by this site (none first-party; Cal.com sets functional session cookies only).
